title: More Nonsense Limerick 24
content:
There was a young person in green,
    Who seldom was fit to be seen;
    She wore a long shawl, 
    Over bonnet and all,
    Which enveloped that person in green.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 24"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
